authors: Soulas T, Gurruchaga JM, Palfi S, Cesaro P, Nguyen JP, Fenelon G
title: Attempted and completed suicides after subthalamic nucleus stimulation for Parkinson’s disease
journal_name: Journal of Neurology Neurosurgery and Psychiatry
study_question: Frequency and characteristics of suicide after STN DBS in advanced Parkinson’s disease
population_assessed: 200 patients with Parkinson’s disease undergoing bilateral STN DBS
outcome_measures: Completed suicide, attempted suicide, depression, impulse regulation
inclusion_criteria: Parkinson’s disease patients undergoing bilateral STN DBS at one centre, 1997-2006
answer_to_study_question: Suicidal behaviour occurred in 3%, associated with postoperative depression and altered impulse regulation
